title: Library Schemas Index
description: Index of all schemas under agentic/schemas/library/. Skills grep this to find the right schema + example template. Format: (name, path, description, example_template_path, applicable_skill).

schemas.name: ClientFirstLibrary
schemas.description: Finsweet Client-First V2.2 class library source of truth. Generated from the V2.2 stylesheet. Used as a denylist/allowlist by validation gates.

schemas.name: ProjectLibrary
schemas.description: Per-project extension of the Client-First library. Tracks which baseline classes are in use + any project-only classes.

schemas.name: LibraryRegistry
schemas.description: Multi-library registry. Lists all known CF-compatible libraries (Client-First, Relume, etc.) with version + scope.
